question: What is the overall denial rate across all claims?
Which payer has the highest denial rate? Show the payer name and denial rate.
expected_dax: EVALUATE TOPN(1, SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_payer[payer_name], "Denial Rate", [Denial Rate]), [Denial Rate], DESC)

question: What is the total billed amount across all claims?
What is the collection rate (paid / billed) overall?
What is the average days to payment overall?
expected_dax: EVALUATE ROW("Avg Days to Payment", [Avg Days to Payment])

question: How many patients are in the system?
What is the average PDC score across all medication adherence rows?
How many patients are in the High SDOH risk tier?
expected_dax: EVALUATE ROW("High Risk Patients", CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(dim_patient), RELATED(dim_sdoh[risk_tier]) = "High"))
